notes: All six declarations are thin wrappers or corollaries of lemmas in Infinity.lean, providing closed-form ordAtInfty computations for quotients, powers, sums, and differences with integer-valued ords. coe_neg_coe and ord_add_le_concrete_of_lt have no external callers in the project. The file is heavily consumed by AdditionPullback/Frobenius.lean and FormalIsogenySeries.lean for Frobenius pullback ord arithmetic.
